safety.title: Air Bags
safety.content: Be extra prepared to navigate uncertainties with the six airbags for 5-door & dual airbags for 3-door, ensuring your safety.

safety.title: Brake Limited Slip Differential Traction Control
safety.content: Experience quicker brake response with reduced pedal pressure and improved braking performance to prevent slipping on slippery surfaces.

safety.title: ESP® (Electronic Stability Programme)
safety.content: Enhances braking stability on slippery and curved roads, preventing both oversteer and understeer.

safety.title: TECT Body
safety.content: The frame structure effectively absorbs and distributes energy during bumps and crashes, ensuring the cabin space remains intact.

safety.title: Hill Descent Control
safety.content: Control your vehicle speed gracefully while descending steep roads.

safety.title: Hill Hold Assist
safety.content: Prevent the vehicle from rolling backward when bravely facing a new peak.

performance.title: Engine Performance
performance.content: The responsive 1.5L K15B engine maintains off-road driving capability, producing strong torque throughout RPM range to provide unwavering power.

performance.title: Ladder Frame Chassis
performance.content: Built with a robust Ladder Frame structure, the Jimny guides you through rugged topographies with full-width rigid axles at front and rear.

performance.title: All Grip Pro
performance.content: Transfer lever modes: 2H for driving at normal speeds on roads, 4H for off-road driving, 4L for navigating rough rocks, mud, and more challenging terrain.

performance.title: 3-Link Rigid Axle Suspension with Coil Spring
performance.content: The Jimny features tough 3-link suspension and rigid axles ensuring stability on any terrain.
